title: KemBALI Biru Takes on the Change It Challenge Finals in Melbourne
author: Kembali Biru Team
desc: Anna, Michelle, and Neyja represented Indonesia at Monash University in Melbourne for the Change It Challenge, presenting their solution to restore marine ecosystems through sustainable community programs.

title: Sungai Watch x KemBALI Biru River Clean-Up
author: Kembali Biru Team
desc: Our collaboration with Sungai Watch successfully removed over 300 bags of waste from Bali’s rivers — a huge step toward cleaner waters and marine safety.

title: Community Workshop: Reuse, Reduce, Recycle
author: Kembali Biru Team
desc: A workshop hosted by Kembali Biru to educate Bali’s youth on the importance of sustainability, waste management, and protecting our oceans.

title: Marine Education for Kids
author: Kembali Biru Volunteers
desc: We held an interactive marine conservation class for primary school students in Nusa Dua to help them learn about ocean life and pollution prevention.
